signals.raw: Solana Network Milestone**: Solana reached an **all-time record of 167 million monthly token holders** as of April 14, with daily non-vote transactions hitting historic highs of 148 million[2]. The **Alpenglow upgrade** is progressing toward reducing transaction finality from 12 seconds to just 150 milliseconds[2].
